subject: stocky older humanoid figure with dark mustache in layered green coat, arms crossed, with ghostly face looming behind
description: A semi-realistic older humanoid figure stands with arms firmly crossed, wearing a layered green coat with prominent gold epaulettes and visible earrings. The face features a thick dark mustache and a stern, weathered expression. Behind the foreground figure, a large faded ghost-image of the same face looms — a stylistic double-exposure effect emphasizing gravitas. The background is a muted parchment tone with the ghost figure rendered in translucent pale lines. No weapon is visible; the figure's hands are folded into the crossed-arm pose.
foreground: older figure in green coat with gold epaulettes, arms crossed, dark mustache
background: parchment cream with ghostly face double-exposure
emotion: stern, arms crossed, weathered confidence, defiant
